prompt: 冲突解决: US-030 在 Git commit 中标记为 Done，但 UPM 中为 In Review，Jira 中为 In Progress — 三方冲突

assertions.name: detects_three_way_conflict
assertions.description: Should detect the three-way conflict across sources

assertions.name: shows_all_conflicting_values
assertions.description: Should display all three conflicting status values

assertions.name: proposes_resolution
assertions.description: Should propose a resolution strategy (e.g., latest-wins or manual review)
